name: Chivey Squash Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, pepper, ginger, nutmeg, allspice, and cayenne pepper in a bowl.
2. In another large mixing bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy. Gradually add the pureed squash, stirring to combine.
3. Add softened butter, then 1/3 of the dry ingredients mixture, and half a cup of buttermilk. Mix thoroughly.
4. Continue adding the remaining dry ingredient mix and buttermilk until everything is well incorporated into the batter.
5. Stir in the chives.
6. Refrigerate the batter for 30 minutes to allow it to set.
7. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
8. Form the squash batter into "cakes" using a spoon or spatula.
9. Cook each cake until evenly browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
10. Serve immediately. Makes 12 cakes.
